name: Fear to Freedom
overview: Feem is a serious working woman. Fangkao is a new intern full of energy. They were forced to compete in the homestay development project. It started with a conflict and competition. Each person expressed themselves to hide their fear. But when they got close, they found themselves quietly supporting one another. When the truth is revealed, they are forced to confront the fear they've been hiding. They decided to cross over from fear to freedom. In the rural atmosphere, that made them discover a new meaning of support and love.

trailers.title: SUB] F2F: Fear to Freedom Behind the Scene
